name: First Majestic Silver Corp.
description: First Majestic Silver Corp. is a Canadian silver-mining company that operates in Mexico and the United States. The company is engaged in the development, exploration, and production of mineral properties, focusing primarily on silver and gold production. It owns and operates several producing mines, including the San Dimas Silver/Gold Mine, the Santa Elena Silver/Gold Mine, and the La Encantada Silver Mine, as well as the Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada.
